amphp/http-client.name: amphp/http-client
amphp/http-client.description: An advanced async HTTP client library for PHP, enabling efficient, non-blocking, and concurrent requests and responses.

suggest.ext-zlib: Allows using compression for response bodies.
suggest.amphp/file: Required for file request bodies and HTTP archive logging

amphp/http-client.description: Non-blocking concurrent HTTP/2 and HTTP/1.1 client based on Amp and Revolt.
Asynchronous concurrent HTTP/2 and HTTP/1.1 client built on the Amp concurrency framework

suggest.amphp/file: Required for file request bodies and HTTP archive logging

amphp/http-client.description: Asynchronous parallel HTTP/2 and HTTP/1.1 client built on the Amp concurrency framework
Asynchronous parallel HTTP/1.1 client built on the Amp concurrency framework
An object-oriented HTTP/1.1 client with no cURL dependency
Artax offers a full-featured HTTP/1.1 client, an object-oriented toolkit modeling the HTTP/1.1 protocol and a spec-compliant content-negotiation API for PHP 5.3+.
